name: GCWing/BitFun
desc: BitFun is a next-generation AI assistant with built-in Code Agent and Cowork Agent. It has memory, personality, and the ability to evolve over time. You can remotely control the desktop through mobile QR pairing or Telegram / Feishu bots, send instructions, and watch each execution step in real time while the Agent keeps working in the background.
